title: solanum gaudichaudii var. pyrethrifolium
intro: Solanum gaudichaudii var. pyrethrifolium is a variety of the Solanum gaudichaudii plant, a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is also known as Pyrethrum, a plant that produces a potent natural insecticide. The medicinal properties of Solanum gaudichaudii var. pyrethrifolium include its ability to repel insects and its potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. This plant is used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, which may provide health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
